name: Sparebanken Møre
longBusinessSummary: Sparebanken Møre, together with its subsidiaries, provides banking services for retail and corporate customers in Norway. The company operates through Retail and Real Estate Brokerage segments. It offers services in the areas of financing, deposits and other forms of investments, payment transfers, financial advisory services, asset management, insurance, and real estate brokerage. Sparebanken Møre was founded in 1843 and is headquartered in Ålesund, Norway.
